name: Features
description: The range of functionalities offered by the app, such as messaging, video calls, group chats, and unique features.
sources: App Descriptions, App Store, Company Websites, Google Play Store, Official App Websites, User Reviews

name: Platform Availability
description: The operating systems and devices on which the app is available, ensuring accessibility for users.
sources: App Store, App Store Listings, Company Websites, Google Play Store, Official App Websites, Official Websites

name: Privacy and Security
description: The measures implemented to protect user data and communications, including end-to-end encryption and data policies.
sources: App Store, Company Websites, Google Play Store, Official App Websites, Privacy Policies, Security Audits

name: User Base
description: The number of active users on the platform, indicating its popularity and the likelihood of friends being present.
sources: App Store, Company Reports, Google Play Store

name: User Experience
description: Overall ease of use, interface design, and user satisfaction.

name: User Reviews and Ratings
description: Feedback from users regarding their experiences with the app, reflecting satisfaction and usability.
sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Independent Review Sites, Review Aggregators
